assertions.title: Planning flow is created for approved ideas (idea→swipe→delivery run)

steps.action: Navigate to Onboarding project Autopilot tab
steps.expected: Autopilot UI loads with Ideas, Swipe Review, and Delivery Runs sections
steps.observed: Autopilot UI renders correctly with all sections visible: Settings, Product Program, Research, Ideas form, Swipe Review with multiple ideas, and Delivery Runs section

steps.action: Fill in Ideas section form and add new idea
steps.expected: Idea appears in the ideas list and Swipe Review section
steps.observed: Created idea 'Test Idea Round 6 - Verify Delivery Run Creation' with score 8. After adding, idea appears in Swipe Review section.

steps.action: Click 'Yes' button on an idea in Swipe Review
steps.expected: Idea is approved AND a delivery run is created
steps.observed: Clicked YES on the new idea. 'Swiped yes — Idea now approved' message appeared. Idea status changed to 'Approved'. Recent Swipes shows YES at 10:31:03 AM. Preference Profile updated to 4 Yes.

steps.action: Check Delivery Runs section for new run
steps.expected: Delivery run appears after idea approval
steps.observed: After reload, Delivery Runs section shows 4 runs total: Run 7fc51321 (full details), Run 258c1825, Run e3fdb8d1, Run 2907bdd8 (newly created). Each run shows: Workspace, Status: pending, Branch: autopilot-run-XXXX, Idea ID, Artifact ID, Paused: No.

assertions.title: End-to-end product loop reachable from project navigation

steps.action: Navigate to Onboarding project Autopilot tab via URL
steps.expected: Full Autopilot surface loads with all sections

steps.action: Verify all autopilot sections are visible
steps.expected: Autopilot Settings, Ideas, Swipe Review, Delivery Runs sections all present
steps.observed: All sections present and functional: Settings (Enable checkbox, Save, Pause/Resume), Product Program, Research, Ideas form (title, description, score, rationale, sources inputs + Add Idea), Swipe Review (Pass/Maybe/Yes/Now buttons for multiple ideas), Delivery Runs (shows 4 runs with metadata), Recent Swipes, Preference Profile.

steps.action: Verify complete E2E flow works: add idea -> swipe YES -> delivery run created
steps.expected: Idea approved via YES creates delivery run visible in Delivery Runs section
steps.observed: Full E2E flow verified: Idea 'Test Idea Round 6' added -> Swiped YES at 10:31:03 AM -> Idea marked Approved -> New delivery run (2907bdd8) appeared in Delivery Runs section. All 4 ideas are now Approved and 4 delivery runs exist.

summary: Round 6 re-validation of VAL-AUTOPILOT-030 and VAL-CROSS-001 after fix commit 6a3db604. Both assertions now PASS. The fix in autopilot/worker.ts (recordSwipe now creates PlanningArtifact and DeliveryRun for YES/NOW decisions) works correctly. Ideas can be added via the form, appear in Swipe Review, and when swiped YES/NOW, a delivery run is created with workspace, branch, idea ID, and artifact ID visible in the Delivery Runs section. The E2E product loop (navigate -> add idea -> swipe YES -> delivery run created) is fully functional.
